title: How did Jane receive a letter from a stranger?

meanings.usage: 指不认识的人或不太熟悉的人
表示被动地收到某物，如信件、礼物等
指女性后代，与son（儿子）相对
dream of doing something 表示梦想做某事
travel的现在分词形式，表示正在进行的动作
特指英吉利海峡（the Channel）连接英国和法国
通常指玻璃或塑料容器，这里指装纸条的瓶子
表示有规律地、频繁地做某事
指寄送信件和包裹的机构
throw into 表示扔进某处

phrases.usage: 表示从未想过、从不敢想，用于强调意外或惊讶

examples.en: She never dreamed of winning the lottery.

phrases.usage: 把...放入...，表示将东西放进容器或地方

examples.en: He put the letter into the envelope.

phrases.usage: 把...扔进...，强调动作的方向性

examples.en: She threw the bottle into the sea.
I often think of my childhood.
I write to my parents every week.

phrases.usage: 决定做某事，表示经过思考后做出选择
多一点，修饰不可数名词或形容词比较级

examples.en: I need a little more time.

phrases.usage: 十个月后，表示过去某个时间点之后的时间

examples.en: He left home, and ten months later he returned.
examples.zh: 他离开了家，十个月后他回来了。

grammar.title: 一般过去时（Simple Past Tense）
grammar.definition: 表示在过去某个特定时间发生的动作或存在的状态
grammar.usage: 用于叙述过去发生的事情，如故事、经历、历史事件等

examples.en: Last year, we were travelling across the Channel.
examples.zh: 去年，我们正在穿越英吉利海峡。

examples.en: She threw the bottle into the sea.
Ten months later, she received a letter.
examples.zh: 十个月后，她收到了一封信。

grammar.title: 一般将来时（Simple Future Tense）
grammar.definition: 表示将来要发生的动作或存在的状态
grammar.structure: 主语 + will + 动词原形 / 主语 + be going to + 动词原形
grammar.usage: 用于预测、计划、承诺等将来发生的事情

examples.en: Letters will cost a little more.

grammar.title: 过去进行时（Past Continuous Tense）
grammar.definition: 表示在过去某个时刻或时间段正在进行的动作
grammar.structure: 主语 + was/were + 动词-ing形式
grammar.usage: 用于描述故事发生的背景或正在进行的动作

examples.en: Last year, we were travelling across the Channel.
examples.zh: 去年，我们正在穿越英吉利海峡。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + never thought of + doing something

original.en: She never thought of it again.
original.zh: 她再也没想过这件事了。

imitations.en: I never thought of giving up.
He never thought of asking for help.

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + receive(d) + something + from + 地点/人物

original.en: She received a letter from a girl in Holland.
original.zh: 她收到了一封来自荷兰女孩的信。

imitations.en: I received a gift from my friend.
imitations.zh: 我收到了朋友的一份礼物。

imitations.en: She received a call from her mother.
imitations.zh: 她接到了她妈妈的来电。

sentencePatterns.pattern: Both + 主语 + 动词 + to each other regularly

original.en: Both girls write to each other regularly now.
original.zh: 现在两个女孩定期互相写信。

imitations.en: They talk to each other regularly.

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + have/has decided to + 动词原形

original.en: They have decided to use the post office.

imitations.en: She has decided to study abroad.
We have decided to start a business.
